title: Implement core domain schemas, state machines, and data boundaries

environment.os: Windows local; clean-checkout GitHub Actions pending on Ubuntu and Windows

commands.name: Missing domain and migration modules
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/domain-state.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/domain-migrations.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The domain and migration modules did not exist

commands.name: Focused domain verification
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/domain-state.test.ts tests/unit/domain-schemas.test.ts tests/unit/domain-reducers.test.ts tests/unit/domain-evidence.test.ts --project property tests/property/domain-invariants.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/domain-migrations.test.ts

bdd.rationale: FND-03 defines shared state and persistence contracts but introduces no user-facing workflow.

assets.altText: Generated approval and run state diagrams showing actor authority and terminal transitions.
assets.caption: Reducer-derived state tables and Mermaid diagrams; automation has only the APPROVED-to-HOLD approval path.

proofs.description: Impossible approval, finding, and run-state examples
Valid and invalid records for every core entity schema
Pure reducers, immutability, serialization, retry, and workspace boundaries
Generated diagram and migration-report drift contract
Seeded authority, evidence, isolation, retry, and terminal-state invariants
PostgreSQL migrations, state guards, immutable history, and referential boundaries
Shared Zod schemas, transition reducers, and workspace boundary store
Initial PostgreSQL domain schema and invariant triggers
Transactional migration loader with checksum drift detection
Repository gate for generated transition and migration evidence
Generated state-transition tables and Mermaid diagrams
Generated table, immutability, and migration checksum inventory

knownLimitations: This foundation task does not implement server routes, browser execution, or user-facing screens.
The generated state diagram proves the implemented transition contract, not Pactwire product effectiveness.
Clean-checkout Ubuntu and Windows CI evidence is pending.
